```
TASK-004 → TASK-005 → TASK-006
```

## Instructions for parallel-skill-builder

1. Launch one Claude window per task in each parallel group
2. Each window receives ONLY its prompt file (full context embedded)
3. Wait for all tasks in a group before starting the next group
4. Sequential chains: pass output of each task as input context to the next
5. Report results back to `.orchestrator/state.yaml`

## Post-Execution

After all tasks complete:
- Run `python scripts/validate_state.py` to verify consistency
- Run `python scripts/report.py` for progress summary
- Check for any tasks that need human review (Tier 3 verification)
